parameters.query:
UPDATE submissions
  SET tags = ARRAY(SELECT json_array_elements_text($1::json)),
      risk_level = $2,
      priority = $3,
      is_spam = $4,
      requires_response = $5,
      status = 'triaged'
  WHERE id = $6::uuid

UPDATE submissions
  SET freedom_relevance_score = $1,
      credibility_score = $2,
      safety_concern = $3,
      tags = ARRAY(SELECT json_array_elements_text($4::json)),
      geo = ARRAY(SELECT json_array_elements_text($5::json)),
      reasoning = $6,
      risk_level = $7,
      priority = $8,
      summary_text = $9,
      key_entities = ARRAY(SELECT json_array_elements_text($10::json))
  WHERE id = $11::uuid
  RETURNING id, freedom_relevance_score, credibility_score, safety_concern

WITH url_check AS (
  SELECT id FROM user_story_items
  WHERE url = $2 AND url NOT LIKE 'intake://%'
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO user_story_items (
  submission_id,
  url,
  extracted_text,
  content_hash,
  title,
  region,
  urgency,
  source_content,
  metadata,
  topics,
  freedom_relevance_score,
  credibility_score,
  geo,
  safety_concern,
  reasoning,
  risk_level,
  priority,
  summary_text,
  key_entities,
  tier
)
SELECT
  $1::uuid,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  $7,
  $8,
  $9::jsonb,
  ARRAY(SELECT json_array_elements_text($10::json)),
  $11,
  $12,
  ARRAY(SELECT json_array_elements_text($13::json)),
  $14,
  $15,
  $16,
  $17,
  $18,
  ARRAY(SELECT json_array_elements_text($19::json)),
  2
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM url_check)
ON CONFLICT (content_hash) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id
UPDATE submissions SET queued_for_insight = TRUE WHERE id = $1::uuid

UPDATE submissions
  SET github_issue_url = $1
  WHERE id = $2::uuid

UPDATE submissions
  SET github_issue_url = $1,
      status = 'triaged'
  WHERE id = $2::uuid
